description:
Install any app on Samsung Tizen devices — TVs, projectors and smart monitors

Cross-platform desktop installer that side-loads any app onto Samsung Smart TVs, projectors and smart monitors running Tizen OS — Jellyfin, Moonlight, Moonfin, Litefin and a community catalog, or your own WGT package. Handles device discovery, Tizen certificates and installation. Successor to Jellyfin2Samsung.Jellyfin2Samsung.
📦 v2.5.6 — 2026-06-18
🩹 Stable release v2.5.6
A small follow-up release focused on error reliability, UX, and MacOS binaries.
🔀 changes
- Writing probe errors to the log instead of showing on users screen.
- Fixing the scrollbar in the releases dropdown, was not visible.
- Bundle native arm64 esbuild (fix JS transpilation on Apple Silicon) (#411)
⬆️ Updating
From v2.5.5+: auto-update works
New Contributors
- @abarbarich made their first contribution in #411
Full Changelog: v2.5.5...v2.5.6
